<!-- Thanks for contributing to OpenProductKit! -->

## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes live under `template/` (or docs/CI) as appropriate
- [ ] Generated a project and ran `opk test` + `opk lint`
- [ ] Frontend `typecheck` + `build` pass (if the frontend changed)
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`) if behavior changed
- [ ] The core stays pure (no FastAPI/DB/HTTP in `packages/core`)
- [ ] CI is green on Linux **and** Windows
